sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_CREATOR

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_a870cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c84
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_CREATOR</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_CREATOR</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_CREATOR = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_CREATOR.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"CREATOR","check_name":"Studio Application Projects Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_app_eng_studio_project");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=5)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" projects",finding:c+" AES projects found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" projects",finding:c+" AES project(s) found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 projects",finding:"No App Engine Studio projects found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Active Studio application projects indicate platform investment in custom development. A healthy volume of projects signals that Now Assist for Creator will have meaningful impact accelerating developer productivity across the portfolio.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure developers are using App Engine Studio for application development.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CREATOR","check_name":"Developer User Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sys_user_has_role");
ga.addQuery("role.name","IN","admin,mid_server,app_engine_developer,delegated_developer");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=10)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" developers",finding:c+" users with developer roles found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" developers",finding:c+" developer(s) found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 developers",finding:"No users with developer roles found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Developer user volume determines the scale of productivity gains from Now Assist Code Generation. More active developers means greater aggregate time savings from AI-assisted scripting, flow creation, and application development.","remediation_guidance":"Identify and onboard developers to Now Assist for Creator to maximize AI code generation adoption.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CREATOR","check_name":"Now Assist for Creator Installed","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
sa.addQuery("scope","sn_now_creator");
sa.setLimit(1);sa.query();
if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"Now Assist for Creator is installed."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Now Assist for Creator (sn_now_creator) not installed."};
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist for Creator enables generative AI capabilities within App Engine Studio, allowing developers to describe functionality in plain language and have code, business logic, and flows generated automatically. Without this plugin, AI-assisted development features are unavailable.","remediation_guidance":"Install Now Assist for Creator from the ServiceNow Store.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CREATOR","check_name":"Custom Application Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sys_app_application");
ga.addQuery("scope","!=","global");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=10)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" custom apps",finding:c+" custom scoped apps found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" custom apps",finding:c+" custom app(s) found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 custom apps",finding:"No custom scoped apps found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Custom application volume reflects the breadth of platform development activity. Higher application counts increase the ROI of Now Assist Code Generation and AI-assisted development, as more teams benefit from accelerated delivery.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure custom applications are being built using App Engine or Studio.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CREATOR","check_name":"ATF Test Suite Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sys_atf_test_suite");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sys_atf_test_suite not found", finding: "ATF Test Suite table is not available. Verify the Automated Test Framework plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sys_atf_test_suite");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var c = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (c >= 10) return { status: "ready", actualValue: c + " test suites", finding: c + " ATF test suites found. Sufficient test coverage to validate AI-generated code safely." };
    if (c > 0) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: c + " test suites", finding: c + " ATF test suite(s) found (target: 10+). Limited test coverage increases risk when deploying Now Assist generated code." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "0 test suites", finding: "No ATF test suites found. Without test coverage, AI-generated code cannot be safely validated before deployment." };
})()","ai_justification":"ATF test suite coverage is a prerequisite for safely deploying AI-generated code. Without adequate test coverage, AI-generated scripts and flows cannot be validated before promotion, increasing deployment risk.","remediation_guidance":"Build ATF test suites to validate custom applications and enable AI test generation.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CREATOR","check_name":"Flow Designer Flow Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sys_hub_flow");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" flows",finding:c+" Flow Designer flows found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" flows",finding:c+" flows found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 flows",finding:"No Flow Designer flows found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Flow Designer flows are a primary target for Now Assist AI generation capabilities. Existing flow volume indicates automation maturity and provides the foundation for AI Agents to orchestrate multi-step workflows automatically.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure processes are being automated using Flow Designer to maximize AI generation value.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CREATOR","check_name":"Update Set Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sys_update_set");
ga.addQuery("state","!=","ignore");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=10)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" update sets",finding:c+" update sets found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" update sets",finding:c+" update set(s) found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 update sets",finding:"No update sets found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Update set volume reflects active customization and development cadence. A healthy update set practice ensures AI-generated changes can be properly tracked, tested, and migrated across environments.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure development changes are captured in update sets.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CREATOR","check_name":"Now Assist Code Generation Installed","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
sa.addQuery("scope","sn_now_assist_code");
sa.setLimit(1);sa.query();
if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"Now Assist Code Generation is installed."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Now Assist Code Generation (sn_now_assist_code) not installed."};
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist Code Generation provides AI-powered code suggestions and script generation within Studio and App Engine. This capability reduces development time and improves code quality by leveraging LLMs trained on ServiceNow platform patterns.","remediation_guidance":"Install Now Assist Code Generation from the ServiceNow Store.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CREATOR","check_name":"Now Assist for Virtual Agent (Creator) Installed","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
sa.addQuery("scope","sn_nowassist_va");
sa.setLimit(1);sa.query();
if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"Now Assist for Virtual Agent is installed."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Now Assist for Virtual Agent (sn_nowassist_va) not installed."};
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist for Virtual Agent (Creator) enables AI-generated topic suggestions and NLU enhancements for custom applications built in App Engine. Without this, AI-powered conversational experiences cannot be generated for custom apps.","remediation_guidance":"Install Now Assist for Virtual Agent from the ServiceNow Store.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"CREATOR","check_name":"Service Catalog Items Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sc_cat_item");
ga.addQuery("sys_class_name","!=","sc_cat_item_producer");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" items",finding:c+" catalog items found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" items",finding:c+" catalog items found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 items",finding:"No catalog items found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Service catalog items represent fulfillment workflows that AI Agents can automate end-to-end. A healthy catalog volume maximizes the impact of Now Assist for Creator in generating and optimizing catalog items and fulfillment flows.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure service catalog items are managed in ServiceNow to unlock AI generation capabilities.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_CREATOR'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:47</sys_created_on><sys_id>a870cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c84</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_CREATOR</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_a870cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c84</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
